summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of UnoXdue admin AI/SEO flows (Step 4). All 6 requested flows passed: direct login (no forced change-password), AI/SEO page load with correct toggles + usage cards, toggle auto-sync + save + persistence after reload, AI page batch processing, Contents page AI column + per-row process button, Contents page batch button. Real LLM calls (gpt-5.4-mini via Emergent) work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Both AIGen.jsx and Contents.jsx use the same data-testid='ai-batch-btn'. They are on different routes so no collision occurs in practice, but consider differentiating (e.g. 'ai-batch-btn-settings' vs 'ai-batch-btn-contents') for clearer test targeting.
Contents.jsx processOne shows 'AI completata per <slug>' regardless; OK but the message uses the slug rather than the title - acceptable since slug is unique.
test_credentials: admin@unoxdue.net / UnoXdue#Admin-2026! (verified working, must_change_password=false, NOT modified during tests)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 16 episodi/interviste already in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 4 AI admin flows fully verified. Observed behaviors: (1) GET /api/admin/ai/settings returns enabled=true, auto_on_sync=false, auto_shorts=false, transcription disabled, daily/monthly usage numeric. (2) Toggle auto-sync ON + Save -> message 'Impostazioni AI salvate.' and persists across reload. (3) AI page batch returned 'Batch AI: 12 ok, 0 falliti su 12.' on first run with real LLM. (4) Per-row 'Elabora con AI' button on /admin/contenuti -> 'AI completata per <slug>.' and AI column badge shows 'Generato'. (5) Contents page batch (only_missing=true) returned '0 ok, 0 falliti su 0' after the AI-page batch already processed everything - expected behavior. Note: during testing auto_on_sync was toggled ON then reverted back to OFF; current persisted state at end of test is OFF (original).

detailed_results.usage_cards_visible: PASS - 'Uso oggi' and 'Uso questo mese' rendered with numbers
detailed_results.toggle_save_persistence: PASS - toggle auto-sync -> save shows 'Impostazioni AI salvate.' -> reload retains ON state
detailed_results.contents_page_loads: PASS - 16 rows, AI column with badges visible
detailed_results.per_row_process: PASS - contents-msg 'AI completata per "fabio-ceravolo-130-gol-carriera".' and badge 'Generato'
detailed_results.contents_page_batch: PASS - 'Batch AI: 0 ok, 0 falliti su 0.' (nothing missing after prior batch)
